overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through rainy city streets from a narrow industrial alley into a wide downtown corridor with neon signs, digital billboards, palm trees, and light futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley with overhead pipes

events.description: begins walking forward through the narrow alleyway
passes by a pedestrian in green shorts standing on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow industrial alley between green and brown buildings with overhead pipes

notable_agents.action: person in green shorts standing near the wall smoking
person standing near the wooden platform and barriers

entered.detail: multi-story industrial building with green metal trim and large windows
brown concrete building with small windows and green trim
large green industrial pipes and ductwork spanning across the alley
yellow and red striped construction barriers blocking off area
futuristic silver sedan parked in the middle of the alley

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow industrial alleyway flanked by a green industrial building on the left and a brown concrete building on the right. Large industrial pipes crisscross overhead. A silver futuristic car is parked ahead with construction barriers on the left. A few pedestrians stand around in the wet alley.

events.description: exits the narrow alley into the open city intersection with palm trees visible
crosses the wet street area with cars passing by on the left

agents.ego_description: exiting the alley and crossing into the main city street toward the palm-lined boulevard

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
dark colored futuristic car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: black metal and concrete transit barriers with overhead covers
tall palm trees lining the distant street
large illuminated digital advertising screens on building facades
tall futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley into a wide urban intersection. The space opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers with digital billboards, palm trees in the distance, and black metal transit checkpoint structures. The camera crosses the wet asphalt as futuristic cars drive past on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with large mural and transit lane

events.description: passes a pedestrian walking in the same direction on the sidewalk
approaches the large vertical mural on the right building wall

agents.ego_description: walking down the main city street sidewalk alongside traffic, passing the large mural

notable_agents.action: person in green shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall vertical mural of a robed figure painted on the red building wall
concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags and street art
elevated walkway structure connecting buildings across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main city street sidewalk with a prominent vertical mural of a robed figure on the right wall. Palm trees line the left side of the street while moderate traffic flows on the wet road. An elevated overpass is visible ahead spanning between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with diner and overhead skybridges

events.description: passing Tom's Diner with illuminated neon signage on the right
continues walking under the elevated skybridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking past Tom's Diner and continuing down the street under elevated walkways

entered.detail: retro-style diner with red and white striped awning and circular neon sign
concrete wall with large skull graffiti and text reading PAURE
enclosed glass skybridge connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the city street past Tom's Diner with its distinctive neon signage and striped awning. The street becomes more enclosed with building skybridges overhead. The left side features a concrete wall with large skull graffiti while sparse traffic continues on the wet road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped industrial alleyway into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic downtown. It begins by navigating a narrow passage flanked by green and brown concrete buildings with industrial pipes crisscrossing overhead, passing a parked silver car and construction barriers. As the camera emerges from the alley, the space opens abruptly into a wide urban intersection dominated by towering glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, and black metal transit checkpoints. The scene then shifts to a sidewalk walk past a large vertical mural of a robed figure and lining palm trees, moving toward an elevated overpass spanning the wet road. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera passes the neon signage of Tom's Diner and moves beneath building skybridges, gliding past a concrete wall marked with large skull graffiti.
